# Cue

Cue is an image-first desktop app. This file is the short repo map for tools that want a small amount of context before reading code.

## Read First

- [`README.md`](README.md)
- [`PRD.md`](PRD.md)
- [`AGENTS.md`](AGENTS.md)
- [`docs/README.md`](docs/README.md)

## Optional Intake

- [`agent-intake.json`](agent-intake.json)
- [`docs/agent_intake_status.md`](docs/agent_intake_status.md)
- [`docs/agent_quickstart.md`](docs/agent_quickstart.md)
- [`docs/aip-1.schema.json`](docs/aip-1.schema.json)

If intake is unavailable, fall back to the local docs and entrypoints below.

## Key Repo Areas

- Desktop app: [`desktop/src/canvas_app.js`](desktop/src/canvas_app.js), [`desktop/src/index.html`](desktop/src/index.html), [`desktop/src/styles.css`](desktop/src/styles.css)
- Tauri backend: [`desktop/src-tauri/src/main.rs`](desktop/src-tauri/src/main.rs), [`desktop/src-tauri/tauri.conf.json`](desktop/src-tauri/tauri.conf.json)
- Native runtime: [`rust_engine/crates/brood-cli/src/main.rs`](rust_engine/crates/brood-cli/src/main.rs), [`rust_engine/crates/brood-engine/src/lib.rs`](rust_engine/crates/brood-engine/src/lib.rs)
- Event contracts: [`rust_engine/crates/brood-contracts/src/events.rs`](rust_engine/crates/brood-contracts/src/events.rs)
- Release automation: [`RELEASING.md`](RELEASING.md), [`scripts/release_check.sh`](scripts/release_check.sh)

## Common Commands

- `./scripts/dev_desktop.sh`
- `cd desktop && npm test`
- `cd desktop && npm run build`
- `cd desktop/src-tauri && cargo check`
- `./scripts/release_check.sh`

## Notes

- prefer `CUE_*` environment variables; `BROOD_*` still works as a temporary compatibility layer
- keep user-facing naming on Cue
- do not commit secrets; use `.env` based on [`.env.example`](.env.example)
